testing_progress.highlight: devnet-7 live; payload withholding tests underway; PTC blob votes not counted when payload absent — clients investigating
Prysm beacon API performance issue caused 2-second payload propagation delay; builder 0 only affected; root cause found
SSZ stable container perf impact inconclusive at 3k active validators; Prysm capturing profiles; devnet-8 to add more active validators

fork_status_and_schedule.highlight: Beacon API / builder API PRs (#625, #630) need rough consensus by Monday ACDT; target devnet-8 the week after
devnet-8 spec sheet published; target early August; public devnet + non-finality devnet both in August; first testnet targeting September
SFI ratification: testing team (EthPandaOps) + EL teams confirm all devnet-7 EIPs ready; PRs to SFI will be opened

eip_proposals_hegota.highlight: EIP-8334 Bundled Attestation Propagation: deduplicates attestation data; up to 50% bandwidth savings; backwards compatible; PFI'd for Hegota

EIP-8341 Partial Execution Payload Commitments: builder bids all EL header fields except state root; alternative to EIP-7862; CL impact small; block hash / full-vs-empty detection needs Engine API solution

EIP-8321 Hash-Chain RANDAO: replaces BLS RANDAO with hash-chain pre-images for PQ safety; broad concern that BLS is still used everywhere else; question of iterative-vs-holistic PQ approach unresolved; no PFI decision reached
EIP-8015 Remove deposit/ETH1 data fields: cleans up pre-Electra deposit remnants; enabled by progressive containers; no state-growth concern

client_updates.highlight: Circuit breaker status: Lighthouse — not yet implemented; Grandine — only Fusaka version exists; Prysm — targeting devnet-8; Teku — merged
Marius (Geth/Reth): Engine API REST-SSZ spec review — several eth_ methods duplicated or dead (eth1 deposit path); CL teams asked to report which they still use

action_items.action: Review beacon-APIs PRs #625 and #630; DVT providers, VC tooling, and CL teams provide feedback before Monday ACDT
Report which Engine API eth_ methods your CL client still uses to Marius (or SSZ channel on R&D Discord)
Non-headliner Hegota submission window closes August 6; submit EIPs by then

decisions.decision: All devnet-7 EIPs ratified SFI; PRs to update EIP statuses will be opened
EIP-8334 Bundled Attestation Propagation: PFI for Hegota; will be made required at fork even though backwards compatible
EIP-8321 Hash-Chain RANDAO: no PFI; consensus that full PQ approach must be decided before enshrining any iteration; async discussion to continue in Post Quantum Discord channel

targets.target: Beacon API / builder API PR rough consensus — Monday July 28 (ACDT)
Hegota non-headliner EIP submission deadline — August 6, 2026
